question_english: Technology has definitely changed over time. Tell me about one of your earliest memories of using a technological device, like an old computer or cell phone. What was the gadget like back then, and how has that specific technology evolved over the years?
goal: 과거와 현재 기술을 비교하면서, 변화의 이유와 근거를 포함해 설명한다.
frame_slots: [{"slot": "old_device", "frame_en": "Describe the old device", "label_ko": "과거 기기 설명"}, {"slot": "device_features_past", "frame_en": "Features of the device in the past", "label_ko": "과거 기기 특징"}, {"slot": "device_features_present", "frame_en": "Features of the device now", "label_ko": "현재 기기 특징"}, {"slot": "reason_for_change", "frame_en": "Explain why the technology evolved", "label_ko": "변화 이유 설명"}]
sample_answer: One of my earliest memories is using a basic cell phone that could only make calls and send texts. Back then, the device was bulky and had a small black-and-white screen. Over the years, technology evolved because people needed more convenience and better communication tools. Now, smartphones have large touchscreens and many apps, which help us stay connected and do many tasks easily.

question_english: How have the overall hairstyles and salon trends in your country changed over recent years? What specific haircuts are popular right now, and how do they compare to the styles from the past?
goal: 최근과 과거 헤어스타일을 비교하며 변화 이유를 간단히 설명한다.
frame_slots: [{"slot": "current_trends", "frame_en": "Describe current popular hairstyles", "label_ko": "현재 인기 헤어스타일"}, {"slot": "past_styles", "frame_en": "Describe past hairstyles", "label_ko": "과거 헤어스타일"}, {"slot": "reason_for_change", "frame_en": "Briefly explain why trends changed", "label_ko": "변화 이유 간단 설명"}]
sample_answer: Currently, many people prefer natural and simple hairstyles like layered cuts. In the past, more elaborate styles like perms were popular. The change happened because people now want easier maintenance and a more casual look.

question_english: How have household appliances changed over the past few years due to new technology? Give me a few specific examples of these modern upgrades and explain how they have transformed people's daily routines at home.
goal: 가전제품 변화와 그 이유를 구체적인 예와 함께 설명한다.
frame_slots: [{"slot": "appliance_examples", "frame_en": "Examples of modern appliances", "label_ko": "현대 가전제품 예"}, {"slot": "changes", "frame_en": "Describe how they changed", "label_ko": "변화 설명"}, {"slot": "impact_on_routine", "frame_en": "Explain impact on daily life", "label_ko": "일상에 미친 영향"}, {"slot": "reason_for_change", "frame_en": "Explain why these changes happened", "label_ko": "변화 이유 설명"}]
sample_answer: Household appliances like refrigerators and washing machines have become smarter with new technology. For example, smart refrigerators can track food expiration and suggest recipes, while washing machines have energy-saving modes. These changes happened because people want more convenience and to save time, which has made daily chores easier.
rule_only_hint: 비교할 때는 변화 이유와 근거를 반드시 포함하세요.
